title: Trump Sours on British Leader Over Iran War: ‘What If Donald Shouts at Me?’
summary_full: President Trump once called Prime Minister Keir Starmer a friend. But Mr. Starmer’s decision not to join the attacks on Iran has led to merciless mocking by the president.
summary_public: President Trump once called Prime Minister Keir Starmer a friend. But Mr. Starmer’s decision not to join the attacks on Iran has led to merciless mocking by the president.

GB.label: positive
GB.evidence: Mr. Starmer’s decision not to join the attacks on Iran
